author: nflaig
content: https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/612 more thoughts on this? would everyone be fine with using `204`

author: potuz
content: Added this one to start the conversation. cc <@602753420033785856> I added the post version without removing the get one. Happy to pass this over to anyone  https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/625

author: nflaig
content: ah potuz I missed that comment, was just thinking the changes would be easier to digest if it shows the diff, rather then just additions

author: nflaig
content: also there is https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/624 which will conflict, but we can easily sort this out later

author: nflaig
content: <@358120958726373381> thoughts? I am mostly worried that clients have easier time handling this as an error compared to a success case, seems like Nimbus would be in favor of using 204, but I would like 1-2 more approvals from others

author: nflaig
content: also <@737740104281489531> and <@447681299742982144> can you guys handle this easily as a separate success (204) response

author: potuz
content: happy to just overwrite the existing one

author: potuz
content: or happy to just leave the whole thing to someone else

author: potuz
content: but we need this urgently to deal with the builder API correctly

author: nflaig
content: I would prefer that, so it should removing the `builder_boost_factor` and moving it to `POST` + adding `BuilderPreferences` in the request body? I just wanna make it easier to digest for others, I have the builder stuff aleady implemented in lodestar, so not worried about that

author: nflaig
content: we also need a separate api to submit `BuilderPreferences` outside of block production? I think there was the ask from builders that they wanna know this beforehand and not JIT, or is that no longer needed with your PR to submit them during block production?

author: potuz
content: yeah I don't want to touch the builder API repo, happy to help if that endpoint needs any help, but at the very least we need the JIT version cause the BN needs to contact the builders

author: nflaig
content: my worry isn't the path from beacon node to builder, it's more the signing and validator path which requires updates in charon, ssv, vouch, vero, web3signer etc etc, so we need to source feedback from those parties as well and make sure we are not designing the spec in a way that is impossible for them to implement

author: nflaig
content: but also not sure who is updating the builder spec now lol

author: potuz
content: yeah I agree,  I am not in a hurry for those yet
